title: Nestora Artifact Descriptor
description: Artifact state contract returned on job status and result payloads for JSON, DXF, and PDF exports.

kind.description: Artifact kind exposed by the backend.

label.description: Human-readable artifact name for the UI.

url.description: Download or fetch URL. Present only when the artifact is available.

message.description: Explicit status explanation rendered in the UI.

content_type.description: HTTP content type for download responses when known.

filename.description: Suggested download filename when the artifact is available.
